title: Tsaphown #6829
definition:
Zaphon = "north"

 1) a city in Gad east of the Sea of Galilee on the east bank of the
    Jordan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zaphon = "north"

 1) a city in Gad east of the Sea of Galilee on the east bank of the
    Jordan

    NASB:  north, a place on the E. bank of the Jordan
